bug_fix.description: Debug and fix an issue or bug
bug_fix.instructions: Recon investigates the issue, Medic diagnoses and plans the fix, QA verifies. Results flow to Engineer for implementation.

feature_implementation.description: Implement a new feature or enhancement
feature_implementation.instructions: Recon explores requirements and existing codebase, Engineer implements, QA verifies. Results inform CO decisions.

documentation.instructions: Scribe writes clear, factual documentation with proper citations.

code_review.description: Review code changes for quality and correctness
code_review.instructions: Code-review agent analyzes the diff and surfaces issues.

research.description: Research a topic or gather information
research.instructions: Recon produces a structured report with findings and evidence.

performance.instructions: Recon profiles and identifies bottleneck, Medic proposes optimization, QA verifies improvement.

security.instructions: Recon scans for vulns, Medic plans remediation, QA verifies fix. Escalate to CO before deployment.

deployment.description: Deploy changes to production or staging
deployment.instructions: QA verifies readiness, Judge rules on safety. CO must approve before deployment.

testing.description: Write tests or verify test coverage
testing.instructions: Engineer writes tests, QA verifies coverage and test quality.

refactoring.description: Refactor code for maintainability or performance
refactoring.instructions: Recon maps current structure, Engineer refactors, QA confirms no regressions.
